impact: This clears the no-eligible-tasks state without implementing domain work, giving the worker daemon ordered one-cycle tasks that preserve accepted work and keep progress on deterministic fixtures, validators, syntax sentinels, size guards, and mocked DevHub guardrails before any live or authenticated automation.
summary: Append the next narrow fixture-first and validation-first PP&D lifecycle backlog tranche.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
